prs.title: Strategy persistence, Fundamentals inline editors, docked chat panel & UI fixes
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 2578 custom lines across 50+ files covering strategy persistence, inline editors, a docked chat panel, slide deck mechanics, cookie-based state, and broad UI fixes represents a transformative, multi-week feature effort.

prs.title: Product filtering, fundamentals scrollspy, and related UI
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 959 custom lines spanning product filtering, a scrollspy system with context/nav/content components, a DB migration, seed data updates, AI collector changes, and admin/analytics routes constitutes a major multi-surface feature.

prs.title: SM-445: agent context refactor, product scoped chat
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 364 custom lines touching 44 files across the entire chat agent hierarchy — refactoring agent context and adding product-scoped chat — is a significant architectural refactor of the AI agent layer.

prs.title: SM-442: adds integrated with back to the integration depth slide
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 9 custom lines across 2 files adding a single label/option to an existing integration depth slide is a trivial, single-concern change.

prs.title: Ch/collector improvements
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 757 custom lines across 60 files systematically improving a large suite of AI data-field collectors, gap analysis agents, and their entrypoints represents a major, broad improvement to the AI/agent data-collection layer.

prs.title: fix(SM-450): Assignee label uses email local part when name is missing
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 63 custom lines introducing a shared display-name utility, applying it across a handful of components, and adding a unit test is a clean, self-contained small-medium bug fix with proper test coverage.

stories.name: Strategy & Fundamentals Editing Experience
stories.rationale: Delivered a cohesive strategy and fundamentals authoring experience including persistence, inline editing, product filtering, scrollspy navigation, a docked chat panel, and related UI polish.

stories.name: AI Agent Context & Product-Scoped Chat
stories.rationale: Refactored agent context to support product-scoped chat sessions and improved the collector agent with reliability and capability enhancements.

stories.name: Integration Depth Labeling Improvement
stories.rationale: Added 'Integrated with' label back to the integration depth slide to restore clarity for users reviewing integration status.

stories.name: Assignee Display Name Fallback Fix
stories.rationale: Fixed assignee labels to gracefully fall back to the email local part when a user's display name is not available, improving readability across the platform.
